name: Large Stoneware Tilley Food Storage Canister with Wood Lid Black - Threshold™: Kitchen Canister, Matte Finish
description:
Pretty up your pantry shelves with this Stoneware Tilley Food Storage Canister With Wood Lid from Threshold™. Crafted from sturdy stoneware, this round food storage canister features a smooth, glossy finish in solid black, while grainy undertones add unique appeal. Topped off with a round wood lid with a square wood knob for edgy flair, this storage canister can stow away any food items from coffee beans to tea bags to nuts and baked delights with ease — and the 125 -ounce capacity gives you plenty of room to hold whatever contents you put inside. Line up similar coordinates for a chic, put-together look while keeping your countertops clutter-free.

1962 was a big year. Modernist design hit its peak and moved into homes across the country. And in Minnesota, Target was born — with the revolutionary idea to celebrate design for all. Threshold embodies this legacy with a collection of modern pieces made for everyday living.
